description: Use this API to export dynamics engine and dynamics model messages that are displayed after running a dynamics simulation to CSV file format. If applicable the following data will be included in the specified output file: type, severity, model, model type, bus number, bus name, base kv, area number, owner number, and engine/model messages This API routine was first introduced in release 33.10.0 and 34.2.0. ierr = dynexportcsv(csvfilename)

parameters.name: csvfilename
parameters.description: Name of the csv file to hold exported data. (input).

error_codes.description: Prerequisite requirements for API not met.
error closing csv file; data may not have been written to file.
error writing data to csv file.
